verdict_reason.description: The verdict reason that you wish to override. For a list of possible reasons to override, see [Warning Flags (Verdict Reasons)](https://stytch.com/docs/docs/fraud/guides/device-fingerprinting/reference/warning-flags-verdict-reasons). You may not override the `RULE_MATCH` reason.

override_action.description: The action that you want to be returned for the specified verdict reason. The override action must be one of `ALLOW`, `BLOCK`, or `CHALLENGE`.

override_description.description: An optional description for the verdict reason override.
